name: NASA Technical Reports Server
description: Primary NASA repository for technical reports, conference papers, journal articles, and research reports.

name: PubSpace
description: Open-access archive for NASA-funded peer-reviewed publications and research articles.
focus: NASA-funded journal articles and open-access manuscripts

name: NASA Open Science Data Repository
description: Life and space science publication archive with experiment metadata and open data records.

name: NASA Open Data Portal
description: Public metadata repository for NASA datasets, including science and mission data. Useful for linking publications to datasets.

name: Science Discovery Engine
description: Broad NASA science search portal for discovering publications across NASA disciplines.
